_doc: Wave-5 dev sweep round 3: tie-break-scale lambda x CODE-DEPENDENCY EDGES ONLY (import/pair/test). Round 2 showed code gains (+0.02 nDCG/pMRR at lambda=0.05) while nl regresses via doc mention edges; code-only edges leave doc-seeded nl rankings nearly untouched, so this is the candidate Pareto point for the no-rerank portable config.
